scene_title: Jesus no Monte das Oliveiras com discipulos
narrative_beat: Afresco renascentista de Jesus sentado em pedra rodeado de quatro discipulos ajoelhados

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a Renaissance-style fresco of Christ seated on a stone at the Mount of Olives surrounded by four disciples kneeling in prayer
subject.focal_point: Christ's white-gold robe catching golden light at center
subject.secondary: Disciples wear ochre and crimson mantles. Jerusalem silhouettes fade to monochrome in the distance.
props: four kneeling disciples in ochre-crimson mantles

composition.foreground: Christ and disciples in rich warm tones
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white Jerusalem silhouette with stormy clouds

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, Renaissance fresco texture, floating orange embers

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
classical fresco rendering, reverent depiction, not photorealistic face
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
